property.description: The name of the table to be fetched.
property.name: TableName

property.description: The SQL command to be executed.
property.name: SqlCommand

properties.property: SELECT C.CASE_ID ,C.REPORTING_TYPE_ID ,C.REPORTING_STATUS ,C.CASE_TYPE_GROUP ,C.REPORTING_TYPE ,C.PRODUCT ,C.NM_CATEGORY ,C.NM_SUBCATEGORY ,C.REPORTING_PERIOD ,C.CASE_SUBTYPE ,C.ORIGINATOR ,C.ORIG_WORK_GROUP ,C.OWNER ,C.OWNER_WORK_GROUP ,C.CASE_TYPE ,C.SUBTYPE_DETAIL ,C.PRIORITY ,C.SEVERITY ,C.CLOSURE_LEVEL_1 ,C.CLOSURE_LEVEL_2 ,C.CLOSURE_LEVEL_3 ,C.CLOSURE_LEVEL_4 ,C.CLOSURE_LEVEL_5 ,C.RESP_ORG_GROUP ,C.RESP_ORG ,C.SITE_NAME ,C.PARENT_CASE_FLAG ,C.PARENT_CASE_ID ,C.RELATED_CASE_FLAG ,C.CHILD_COUNT ,C.STATUS ,C.CONDITION ,C.ESCALATION ,C.SIEBEL_PARENT_ORG_ID ,C.SIEBEL_PARENT_ORG_NAME ,C.CLARIFY_BUS_ORG_ID ,C.CLARIFY_BUS_ORG_NAME ,C.CLARIFY_SITE_ID ,C.CHANNEL ,C.CALLER_TICKET_ID ,C.NETWORK_IND ,C.CLOSURE_COMMENTS ,C.CASE_TITLE ,C.CASE_CLOSE_TS ,C.CASE_OPEN_TS ,C.CASE_OPEN_MONTH ,C.CASE_CLOSE_MONTH ,C.CASE_CLOSE_DT ,C.CASE_OPEN_DT ,C.SM_CASE_TTR_SECS ,C.SM_CASE_TTR_INCL_CAN_SECS ,C.NM_TTR_SECS ,C.TTC_SECS ,C.SM_TIME_TO_REPAIR_SECS ,C.NM_TIME_TO_REPAIR_SECS ,C.CASE_MAX_TO_SR_TS ,C.CASE_OBJID ,C.ORIGINATOR_EMPLOYEE_ID ,C.OWNER_EMPLOYEE_ID ,C.CASE_CLOSE_CLNDR_ID ,C.CASE_OPEN_CLNDR_ID ,C.CUSTOMER_ID ,C.SUBTYPE_DETAIL_FAMILY ,C.SBU_BUCKET ,C.SERVICE_SITE ,C.CASE_CAN_TIME_SECS ,C.CALLER_COMPANY ,C.THIRD_PARTY_BUS_ORG_ID ,C.THIRD_PARTY_BUS_ORG ,C.THIRD_PARTY_ROLE_TYPE ,C.THIRD_PARTY_SUBTYPE ,C.THIRD_PARTY_EXT_ACCT_ID ,C.VENDOR_COUNT ,C.VENDOR_REF_IND ,C.VENDOR_REF_IND_ID ,C.ORIGINATING_APP ,C.RESELLER ,C.SUBSCRIBER_TENANT_TN ,C.MASTER_BUS_ORG_ID ,C.MASTER_BUS_ORG ,C.PRODUCT_NAME ,C.TN_COUNT ,C.TN_STATUS ,C.TN_STATUS_DATE ,C.TIME_TO_QUEUE_SECS ,C.TIME_TO_ISOLATE_SECS ,C.CASE_AGE_TIME_SECS ,C.A_LOC ,C.Z_LOC ,C.BANDWIDTH ,C.BUSINESS_GROUP_DESC ,C.MKT_SEGMENT ,C.CASE_QUEUE_TIME_SECS ,C.CASE_AIP_TIME_SECS ,C.CASE_RIP_TIME_SECS ,C.CASE_SR_TIME_SECS ,C.CASE_AHT_TIME_SECS ,C.CASE_MON_TIME_SECS ,C.CASE_LEC_TIME_SECS ,C.SM_TTR_NET_SEC ,C.SM_CASE_TTD_SEC ,C.SERVICE_IDENTIFIER ,C.EXT_NOTE_DESC ,C.EXT_NOTE_LAST_UPDATE ,C.EXT_NOTE_FREQ ,C.PRODUCT_LAYER ,C.SOURCE_SYSTEM ,C.LEGACY_ORIGINAL_SYSTEM ,C.SM_CASE_TRC_SEC ,C.SM_CASE_NIT_SEC ,C.ULTIMATE_CUST_ID ,C.ULTIMATE_CUST_NAME ,C.CALLER_EMAIL ,C.STATUS_CHANGE_COUNT ,C.INTERNAL_NOTES_COUNT ,C.EXT_NOTE_FIRST_UPDATE ,C.PIID ,C.SCID ,C.STATUS_CHANGE_FLAG ,C.RESOLUTION_TYPE ,C.PARTNER_ID ,C.FIX_TYPE ,C.FIRST_CLOSE_DATE ,C.ORIGINATOR_WKGRP_TECHNOLOGY ,C.OWNER_WKGRP_TECHNOLOGY ,C.ORIGINATOR_WKGRP_REGION ,C.OWNER_WKGRP_REGION ,C.GCR_NUMBER ,C.BILLING_ACCOUNT_NUMBER ,C.BILLING_ACCOUNT_NAME ,C.CUST_LOB_ID ,C.CUST_ACCT_SALES_CHANNEL_DESC ,C.EXTERNAL_REPORTING_ROLLUP_DESC ,C.EXTERNAL_REPORTING_ROLLUP_CD ,C.CUST_ACCT_SUB_CHANNEL_CD ,C.CUST_ACCT_SUB_CHANNEL_DESC ,C.CLASS_OF_SERVICE ,C.TN_EXTENSION ,C.VSS_PC_IND ,C.CUST_SEGMENT ,C.DW_CREATE_DT ,C.DW_LAST_MODIFY_DT ,C.DW_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD ,C.DW_DELETED_IND ,C.SERVICE_RESTORED_TS ,C.DISPATCHED_TO_STI_IND ,C.CENTER_USE_1 ,C.CENTER_USE_2 ,C.LEVEL3_DETECTED_IND ,C.LOR_SIMPLEX_TIME_SECS ,C.MANUAL_OOS_DURATION_SECS ,C.PRODUCT_FAMILY ,C.CUST_COMMIT_DT ,C.SERVICE_LEVEL ,C.TICKET_RANK ,C.CALLER_CONTACT ,C.CALLER_PHONE ,C.ORIG_CUST_COMMIT_DT ,C.CUST_REQUEST_DT ,C.REV_CUST_COMMIT_DT FROM DSL_SM.W_CASE C WHERE NVL(C.CASE_CLOSE_DT,SYSDATE) >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'MM'),-27) AND NVL(C.DW_SECURE_COMPANY_NBR,-1) NOT IN (2,4,6)

property.name: PrefetchCount

property.name: DefaultCodePage

property.name: AccessMode

property.name: LobChunkSize

component.description: Looks up values in a reference dataset by using exact matching.

property.description: Specifies the SQL statement that generates the lookup table.
property.name: SqlCommand

property.description: Specifies a SQL statement that uses parameters to generate the lookup table.
property.name: SqlCommandParam

properties.property: select * from (SELECT table_name, last_load_date FROM gfs.table_load_dates) [refTable] where [refTable].[table_name] = ?

property.description: Specifies the type of connection used to access the reference dataset.
property.name: ConnectionType

property.description: Specifies the cache type of the lookup table.
property.name: CacheType

property.description: Specifies how the Lookup transformation handles rows without matching entries in the reference data set.
property.name: NoMatchBehavior

property.description: Specifies the percentage of the cache that is allocated for rows with no matching entries in the reference dataset.
property.name: NoMatchCachePercentage

property.description: Maximum Memory Usage for Reference Cache on a 32 bit platform.
property.name: MaxMemoryUsage

property.description: Maximum Memory Usage for Reference Cache on a 64 bit platform.
property.name: MaxMemoryUsage64

property.description: Indicates whether to reference metadata in an XML format.
property.name: ReferenceMetadataXml

properties.property: <referenceMetadata><referenceColumns><referenceColumn name="table_name" dataType="DT_STR" length="100" precision="0" scale="0" codePage="1252"/><referenceColumn name="last_load_date" dataType="DT_DBTIMESTAMP" length="0" precision="0" scale="0" codePage="0"/></referenceColumns></referenceMetadata>

property.description: Specifies the list of lineage identifiers that map to the parameters that the SQL statement in the SQLCommand property uses. Entries in the list are separated by semicolons.
property.name: ParameterMap

properties.property: #{Package\Cases from CILPD DSL_SM\DC Set table_name.Outputs[Derived Column Output].Columns[table_name]};

property.description: Specifies the column code page to use when code page information is unavailable from the data source.

property.description: Determines whether duplicate keys in the reference data should be treated as errors when full cache mode is used.

component.contactInfo: OLE DB Destination;Microsoft Corporation; Microsoft SqlServer v10; (C) Microsoft Corporation; All Rights Reserved; http://www.microsoft.com/sql/support;4
component.name: staging | cases

property.description: The number of seconds before a command times out. A value of 0 indicates an infinite time-out.
property.name: CommandTimeout

property.description: Specifies the name of the database object used to open a rowset.
property.name: OpenRowset

property.description: Specifies the variable that contains the name of the database object used to open a rowset.
property.name: OpenRowsetVariable

property.description: The SQL command to be executed.
property.name: SqlCommand

property.description: Specifies the column code page to use when code page information is unavailable from the data source.
property.name: DefaultCodePage

property.description: Forces the use of the DefaultCodePage property value when describing character data.
property.name: AlwaysUseDefaultCodePage

property.description: Specifies the mode used to access the database.
property.name: AccessMode

property.description: Indicates whether the values supplied for identity columns will be copied to the destination. If false, values for identity columns will be auto-generated at the destination. Applies only if fast load is turned on.
property.name: FastLoadKeepIdentity

property.description: Indicates whether the columns containing null will have null inserted in the destination. If false, columns containing null will have their default values inserted at the destination. Applies only if fast load is turned on.
property.name: FastLoadKeepNulls

property.description: Specifies options to be used with fast load. Applies only if fast load is turned on.
property.name: FastLoadOptions

property.description: Specifies when commits are issued during data insertion. A value of 0 specifies that one commit will be issued at the end of data insertion. Applies only if fast load is turned on.
property.name: FastLoadMaxInsertCommitSize

property.description: The name of the table to be fetched.
property.name: TableName

property.description: The SQL command to be executed.
property.name: SqlCommand

properties.property: SELECT CASE_OBJID ,CASE_NUMBER AS CASE_ID ,X_CASE_TYPE_LEVEL1 ,X_CASE_TYPE_LEVEL2 ,SUBSTR(REGEXP_REPLACE(X_CASE_TYPE_LEVEL3, '[^0-9A-Za-z/*.()#,~@_:;[]|`\!?{}&$+=-]', ''),1,64) AS X_CASE_TYPE_LEVEL3 ,BUS_ORG_ID ,SUBSTR(REGEXP_REPLACE(BUS_ORG_NAME, '[^0-9A-Za-z/*.()#,~@_:;[]|`\!?{}&$+=-]', ''),1,100) AS BUS_ORG_NAME ,SUBSTR(REGEXP_REPLACE(CASE_X_RESOLVED_AREA, '[^0-9A-Za-z/*.()#,~@_:;[]|`\!?{}&$+=-]', ''),1,64) AS CASE_X_RESOLVED_AREA ,CASE_X_RESP_ORG ,SUBSTR(REGEXP_REPLACE(CASE_REPORTER, '[^0-9A-Za-z/*.()#,~@_:;[]|`\!?{}&$+=-]',''),1,80) AS CASE_REPORTER ,CASE_SITE_TYPE FROM WFMIMP1.CASE_1 WHERE NVL(DW_SECURE_COMPANY_NBR,-1) NOT IN (2,4,6)

property.description: The number of rows fetched in a batch.
property.name: BatchSize

property.name: PrefetchCount

property.name: LobChunkSize
